response: DataSync CEO Maria Chen sent a post-TechConnect conference revenue-share partnership proposal, under which DataSync will handle data sync infrastructure, the recipient will integrate DataSync’s SDK, and the arrangement is projected to reduce customer latency by 60% and yield an estimated $2M in additional annual revenue for both parties. Chen is available for a technical discussion about the proposal in the upcoming week and is inquiring whether the recipient is also available to schedule that conversation.
